title: GPU partition at 97% utilisation — expansion required
summary: GPU partition (4 nodes, 16 GPUs) has run at 97%+ utilisation for 30 days. Average queue wait: 18 hours. 6 jobs currently pending. ML workload growth rate: ~15% MoM. Projected: 20+ GPUs needed by Q3 2026.
notes: H100 nodes recommended. 8-week delivery from approved vendor.
